runtime_guarantees.name: offline_first_core
runtime_guarantees.statement: Core regulation works without sentence-transformers when use_embeddings=false or --no-embeddings is selected.

runtime_guarantees.name: explicit_embeddings_extra
runtime_guarantees.statement: Embedding-backed operation is opt-in through pip install -e .[embeddings].

runtime_guarantees.name: clear_missing_dependency_error
runtime_guarantees.statement: Embedding paths fail with an actionable message when sentence-transformers is unavailable.

runtime_guarantees.name: token_shock_embedding_only
runtime_guarantees.statement: CLI token-shock reporting is embedding-backed and is rejected when --no-embeddings is selected.

runtime_guarantees.name: no_api_surface_change
runtime_guarantees.statement: Current hardening work preserves existing regulation and token-shock API signatures.

formats.name: json
formats.mode: single regulation and batch JSONL records

formats.name: markdown
formats.mode: single regulation and batch audit reports

formats.name: csv
formats.mode: single regulation and batch audit reports

exit_codes.meaning: --fail-on-block was used and a single run blocked, or at least one batch row blocked.

ci_policy.name: embeddings
ci_policy.test_scope: deterministic smoke checks that avoid model downloads

validation_scripts.name: report_schema_validator
validation_scripts.scope: local and CI validation of JSON/JSONL report fixtures

validation_scripts.name: docs_quality
validation_scripts.scope: docs manifest consistency, required file checks, and schema validation for examples

validation_scripts.name: validate_examples
validation_scripts.scope: drift validation for committed CLI JSONL, Markdown, and CSV examples

validation_scripts.name: evaluate_regulator
validation_scripts.scope: offline frozen regression corpus evaluation with expected action, candidate-safety, taxonomy, JSON artifact checks, and the mbt-eval package command

validation_scripts.name: build_eval_report
validation_scripts.scope: Markdown benchmark report generation from regulator evaluation JSON artifacts

validation_scripts.name: preflight
validation_scripts.scope: combined docs checks and pytest execution for release-quality local validation

validation_scripts.name: release_evidence
validation_scripts.scope: machine-readable evidence report for release gate execution

validation_scripts.name: release_readiness
validation_scripts.scope: operator-facing release readiness summary and blocker report

validation_scripts.name: release_check
validation_scripts.scope: one-command release evidence generation and readiness summary

support_boundaries: MBT-5 regulates candidate outputs against supplied reference structure.
MBT-5 is not a universal fact checker.
Public performance claims are limited to the frozen supplied corpus and reference manifolds.
Embedding-backed behavior depends on the optional sentence-transformers extra.
Token-shock reporting is available only in embedding-enabled mode.
